# Bob Test Module

This is a test module for Bob Shell integration.

## Overview

This module provides test content for validating Bob Shell integration with the ctx system.

## Features

- Custom modes for specialized workflows
- Custom tools for enhanced capabilities
- MCP server integration for advanced features

## Usage

Install this module with:

```bash
ctx add ./bob-test-module --tool bob
```

This will install:
- BOB.md context file
- Custom modes in .bob/modes/
- Custom tools in .bob/tools/
- MCP server configurations in .bob/servers/
